get_kalshi-markets.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 市场 get_kalshi-markets
get_kalshi-markets.desc_en: List Kalshi prediction markets with their pricing, volume and status, optionally filtered by market ticker, event ticker, keyword search, status or minimum volume. Results are cursor-paginated.
get_kalshi-markets.description_zh: 列出 Kalshi 预测市场及其价格、成交量与状态，可按 market ticker、event ticker、关键词、状态或最小成交量筛选。结果采用游标分页。

get_kalshi-trades.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 成交记录 get_kalshi-trades
get_kalshi-trades.desc_en: List historical executed trades for Kalshi markets, optionally filtered by market ticker and a time window, returning per-trade price, contract count and taker side. Results are cursor-paginated.
get_kalshi-trades.description_zh: 列出 Kalshi 市场的历史成交记录，可按 market ticker 与时间区间筛选，返回每笔成交的价格、合约数量与吃单方向。结果采用游标分页。

get_kalshi-market-price.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 市场价格 get_kalshi-market-price
get_kalshi-market-price.desc_en: Get the price of a single Kalshi market identified by its market ticker, for both the yes and no sides. Returns the latest available price by default, or the historical price at a given timestamp when at_time is supplied.
get_kalshi-market-price.description_zh: 查询由 market ticker 指定的单个 Kalshi 市场价格，包含 yes 与 no 两侧。默认返回最新可得价格；传入 at_time 时返回该时间点的历史价格。

get_kalshi-orderbooks.heading_zh: 查询 Kalshi 订单簿历史 get_kalshi-orderbooks
get_kalshi-orderbooks.desc_en: Get historical order book snapshots for a single Kalshi market over a time window, returning yes/no bid levels in both cents and dollars. When no time window is given, returns only the latest snapshot. Results are cursor-paginated.
get_kalshi-orderbooks.description_zh: 查询单个 Kalshi 市场在某时间区间内的历史订单簿快照，返回 yes/no 两侧的报价档位（同时给出以分和以美元计的价格）。未指定时间区间时仅返回最新一条快照。结果采用游标分页。

market_ticker.desc_en: Restrict results to one or more specific Kalshi markets by their market ticker.
market_ticker.title_zh: 按一个或多个 Kalshi 市场的 market ticker 限定返回结果。

event_ticker.desc_en: Restrict results to markets belonging to one or more events, identified by event ticker.
event_ticker.title_zh: 按一个或多个 event ticker 限定返回属于这些事件的市场。

search.desc_en: Keyword query matched against market title and description; the value must be URL-encoded.
search.title_zh: 针对市场标题与描述的关键词检索，取值需经 URL 编码。

status.desc_en: Filter by trading state: `open` markets still accept trades, `closed` markets no longer do.
status.title_zh: 按交易状态筛选：`open` 表示仍可交易，`closed` 表示已停止交易。

min_volume.desc_en: Keep only markets whose total trading volume is at least this amount, in dollars.
min_volume.title_zh: 仅保留总成交量不低于该金额的市场，单位为美元。

limit.desc_en: Number of markets to return per page.

pagination_key.desc_en: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page; take it from the pagination object of the previous response.
pagination_key.title_zh: 用于翻到下一页的不透明游标，取自上一次响应的 pagination 对象。

markets.title_zh: 匹配的 Kalshi 市场列表。

markets.event_ticker.desc_en: Ticker of the event this market belongs to.
markets.event_ticker.title_zh: 该市场所属事件的 ticker。

markets.market_ticker.desc_en: Ticker uniquely identifying this market; use it to query price, trades or order book.
markets.market_ticker.title_zh: 唯一标识该市场的 ticker，可用于查询价格、成交记录或订单簿。

markets.title.title_zh: 市场所裁决问题的可读标题。

markets.start_time.desc_en: When trading on the market opens.

markets.end_time.desc_en: Scheduled time at which the market is expected to end.
markets.end_time.title_zh: 市场预计结束的计划时间。

markets.close_time.desc_en: When the market actually resolved and closed; may precede end_time if it finished early, and is null while still open.
markets.close_time.title_zh: 市场实际裁决并关闭的时间；若提前结束可能早于 end_time，仍开放时为 null。

markets.status.desc_en: Current trading state: `open` still accepts trades, `closed` no longer does.
markets.status.title_zh: 当前交易状态：`open` 仍可交易，`closed` 已停止交易。

markets.last_price.desc_en: Price of the most recent trade.

markets.volume.desc_en: Cumulative trading volume since the market opened.
markets.volume.title_zh: 自市场开放以来的累计成交量。

markets.volume_24h.desc_en: Trading volume over the trailing 24 hours.
markets.volume_24h.title_zh: 过去 24 小时的成交量。

markets.result.desc_en: Final outcome of the market once resolved; null while unresolved.
markets.result.title_zh: 市场裁决后的最终结果；未裁决时为 null。
markets.result.annotation: 已裁决时 result 的具体取值集合源码未说明，待研发确认。

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: Page size that was applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应实际采用的每页数量。

pagination.total.desc_en: Total number of markets matching the filters across all pages.
pagination.total.title_zh: 在所有分页中匹配筛选条件的市场总数。

pagination.has_more.desc_en: Whether further pages of results remain.
pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多分页结果。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor to pass as pagination_key on the next request; present only when more results remain.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 下次请求作为 pagination_key 传入的游标，仅在还有更多结果时出现。

error.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
error.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
message.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

ticker.desc_en: Restrict trades to a single Kalshi market by its ticker.
ticker.title_zh: 按 market ticker 将成交记录限定到单个 Kalshi 市场。

start_time.desc_en: Lower bound of the trade time window; only trades at or after this moment are returned.
start_time.title_zh: 成交时间窗的下界，仅返回该时刻及之后的成交。

end_time.desc_en: Upper bound of the trade time window; only trades at or before this moment are returned.
end_time.title_zh: 成交时间窗的上界，仅返回该时刻及之前的成交。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of trades to return per page.
limit.title_zh: 每页返回的成交记录数量上限。

pagination_key.desc_en: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page; take it from the pagination object of the previous response.
pagination_key.title_zh: 用于翻到下一页的不透明游标，取自上一次响应的 pagination 对象。

trades.desc_en: List of executed trades matching the filters.
trades.title_zh: 匹配筛选条件的成交记录列表。

trades.trade_id.desc_en: Identifier uniquely referencing this individual trade.
trades.trade_id.title_zh: 唯一引用该笔成交的标识。

trades.market_ticker.desc_en: Ticker of the market on which the trade executed.
trades.market_ticker.title_zh: 该笔成交所属市场的 ticker。

trades.count.desc_en: Number of contracts exchanged in this trade.
trades.count.title_zh: 该笔成交中交换的合约数量。

trades.yes_price.desc_en: Execution price of the yes side, expressed in cents.
trades.yes_price.title_zh: yes 一侧的成交价格，以分计。

trades.no_price.desc_en: Execution price of the no side, expressed in cents.
trades.no_price.title_zh: no 一侧的成交价格，以分计。

trades.yes_price_dollars.desc_en: Execution price of the yes side, expressed in dollars.
trades.yes_price_dollars.title_zh: yes 一侧的成交价格，以美元计。

trades.no_price_dollars.desc_en: Execution price of the no side, expressed in dollars.
trades.no_price_dollars.title_zh: no 一侧的成交价格，以美元计。

trades.taker_side.desc_en: Which side initiated the trade by crossing the spread: `yes` or `no`.
trades.taker_side.title_zh: 主动吃单成交的一方：`yes` 或 `no`。

trades.created_time.desc_en: Moment at which the trade was executed.

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: Page size that was applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应实际采用的每页数量。

pagination.total.desc_en: Total number of trades matching the filters across all pages.
pagination.total.title_zh: 在所有分页中匹配筛选条件的成交总数。

pagination.has_more.desc_en: Whether further pages of results remain.
pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多分页结果。

pagination.pagination_key.desc_en: Cursor to pass as pagination_key on the next request; present only when more results remain.
pagination.pagination_key.title_zh: 下次请求作为 pagination_key 传入的游标，仅在还有更多结果时出现。

error.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
error.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
message.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

at_time.desc_en: Fetch the historical price as of this moment; omit to get the latest available price.
at_time.title_zh: 查询截至该时刻的历史价格；省略则返回最新可得价格。

yes.desc_en: Price information for the yes side of the market.
yes.title_zh: 市场 yes 一侧的价格信息。

yes.price.desc_en: Yes-side price, expressed in dollars as a probability-like value between 0 and 1.
yes.price.title_zh: yes 一侧价格，以美元计，取值介于 0 与 1 之间，类似概率。

yes.at_time.desc_en: Moment the returned yes-side price corresponds to.
yes.at_time.title_zh: 所返回 yes 一侧价格对应的时间点。

no.desc_en: Price information for the no side of the market.
no.title_zh: 市场 no 一侧的价格信息。

no.price.desc_en: No-side price, expressed in dollars as a probability-like value between 0 and 1.
no.price.title_zh: no 一侧价格，以美元计，取值介于 0 与 1 之间，类似概率。

no.at_time.desc_en: Moment the returned no-side price corresponds to.
no.at_time.title_zh: 所返回 no 一侧价格对应的时间点。

error.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
error.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
message.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。

error.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code indicating the market was not found.
error.title_zh: 表示未找到该市场的简短机器可读错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation that no price data exists for the requested market.
message.title_zh: 对所请求市场不存在价格数据的可读说明。

ticker.desc_en: Kalshi market ticker whose order book history is requested.
ticker.title_zh: 要查询订单簿历史的 Kalshi 市场 ticker。

start_time.desc_en: Lower bound of the snapshot time window; omit together with end_time to get only the latest snapshot.
start_time.title_zh: 快照时间窗的下界；与 end_time 一并省略则只返回最新一条快照。

end_time.desc_en: Upper bound of the snapshot time window; omit together with start_time to get only the latest snapshot.
end_time.title_zh: 快照时间窗的上界；与 start_time 一并省略则只返回最新一条快照。

limit.desc_en: Maximum number of snapshots to return per page; ignored when fetching only the latest snapshot.
limit.title_zh: 每页返回的快照数量上限；仅取最新快照时该参数被忽略。

paginationKey.desc_en: Opaque cursor for fetching the next page; take it from the pagination object of the previous response.
paginationKey.title_zh: 用于翻到下一页的不透明游标，取自上一次响应的 pagination 对象。

snapshots.desc_en: Order book snapshots ordered through the requested time window.
snapshots.title_zh: 在所请求时间窗内排列的订单簿快照。

snapshots.orderbook.desc_en: The bid levels of the order book at this snapshot, split by side and price unit.
snapshots.orderbook.title_zh: 该快照时刻订单簿的报价档位，按方向与价格单位拆分。

snapshots.orderbook.yes.desc_en: Resting yes-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in cents.
snapshots.orderbook.yes.title_zh: yes 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以分计。

snapshots.orderbook.no.desc_en: Resting no-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in cents.
snapshots.orderbook.no.title_zh: no 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以分计。

snapshots.orderbook.yes_dollars.desc_en: Resting yes-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in dollars.
snapshots.orderbook.yes_dollars.title_zh: yes 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以美元计。

snapshots.orderbook.no_dollars.desc_en: Resting no-side orders, each as a [price, contract count] pair with price in dollars.
snapshots.orderbook.no_dollars.title_zh: no 一侧的挂单，每项为 [价格, 合约数量] 对，价格以美元计。

snapshots.timestamp.desc_en: Moment this order book snapshot was captured.
snapshots.timestamp.title_zh: 该订单簿快照的采集时间。

snapshots.ticker.desc_en: Ticker of the market this snapshot belongs to.
snapshots.ticker.title_zh: 该快照所属市场的 ticker。

pagination.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.

pagination.limit.desc_en: Page size that was applied to this response.
pagination.limit.title_zh: 本次响应实际采用的每页数量。

pagination.count.desc_en: Number of snapshots returned in this page.

pagination.paginationKey.desc_en: Cursor to pass as paginationKey on the next request; present only when more results remain.
pagination.paginationKey.title_zh: 下次请求作为 paginationKey 传入的游标，仅在还有更多结果时出现。

pagination.has_more.desc_en: Whether further pages of snapshots remain.
pagination.has_more.title_zh: 是否还有更多分页快照。

error.desc_en: Short machine-readable error code for the failed request.
error.title_zh: 请求失败时的简短机器可读错误码。

message.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of why the request was rejected.
message.title_zh: 对请求被拒原因的可读说明。
